```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's University of California (UC) campuses are among the top-ranked research universities in the country.",
    "The University of California is the world’s academic leader in the number of research inventions.",
    "Active UC companies based in California employed over 19,000 Californians and generated more than $14 billion in revenue in 2014.",
    "The funding from AB 2664 would expand the University of California’s innovation ecosystem to all campuses throughout the state.",
    "The University of California's ability to provide entrepreneurial services has reached its capacity in recent years.",
    "Funding from AB 2664 would be used to establish innovation infrastructure at each UC campus, including incubator space and entrepreneur training.",
    "There are currently 16 UC-run business incubators across UC campuses that have facilitated successful business innovations.",
    "The Skydeck incubator at UC Berkeley has hosted 84 startup teams, which have collectively raised $93 million and created over 650 jobs."
  ]
```
